title: You Need Money to Support Your Oshi
overview: Utage is a huge fan of Tamon from F/ACE and one day, her work leads her to an unexpected meeting.

title: Do You Like Me?
overview: Utage goes to F/ACE's handshaking event but something unexpected happens.

title: You're One of Those Insane Fans
overview: After dropping her F/ACE fan, Utage heads to Tamon's place and finds an unexpected visitor.

title: You're a Sniper of Love
overview: Tamon asks Utage to go to a summer festival with him so he can find true love.

title: RAIN
overview: The competition to decide who will be the new center of F/ACE finally comes to an end.

title: Tamon's B-Side
overview: Tamon is feeling sad after being replaced as center but also wants to show Utage how much he appreciates her.

title: Fans are Terrifying Creatures
overview: Utage tries to enjoy a day off to do Tamon fan activities but randomly bumps into the actual Tamon.

title: F/ACE and the Summer Vacation
overview: Utage is hired as a production assistant when F/ACE has a video shoot at the beach.

title: I'm the One Who's Gonna Win
overview: Utage tries to get her summer vacation homework done as Ouri tries to get her to look his way.

title: Yellow Spring
overview: Utage finds out her new teacher is also a F/ACE fan and she also runs into Natsuki in the wild.

title: Is It Really Okay For Me to Be Here?
overview: Tamon and Utage learn about Natsuki and Asuka's past.

title: FLY
overview: F/ACE makes a surprise appearance at Utage's high school's cultural festival.

title: I've Made Up My Mind
overview: Tamon tries to find out why Utage quit her job as a housekeeper.
